pluginDescription: Temporarily suppress automatic calls to stations that recently ignored repeated calls.
memoryOverviewDesc: Keeps operator-scoped per-callsign memory of recent no-reply failures. Low scores block automatic chasing, recover lazily over time, and do not block stations that directly call you.
blockThresholdDesc: Automatic chasing is blocked when the current score is below this value.
failurePenaltyDesc: Score deducted when a TX1 target is abandoned without any reply. Target switches caused by direct calls deduct half.
recoveryPerCycleDesc: Score added per FT8 transmit/receive round during lazy time-based recovery.
